target_text: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required.
prompt: You are a Content-ID copyright classifier for a music distribution platform. Listen to the uploaded track and check for potential copyright matches against existing recordings. Report the match status (match / no match / partial) and whether the track is cleared for distribution.

32.output: The track is a unique composition and does not match any existing recordings. It is cleared for distribution.

64.output: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required.

96.output: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required.

128.output: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required.

192.output: Track is in the public domain. Licensing is not required.

32.output: Match found. The track contains a well-known copyrighted song. Distribution is not allowed without proper licensing.

64.output: [potential match] The track contains a recognizable sample from "The Gift" by The Notorious B.I.G., which is a copyrighted work.

96.output: Match found with a song by Dr. Dog titled "The Captain". The track is a copyrighted work, so it is not cleared for distribution.

128.output: Match found with a song by Dr. Dog titled "The Captain". The track is a copyrighted work, so it is not cleared for distribution.

192.output: Match found with a song by Dr. Dog titled "The Captain". The track is a copyrighted work, so it is not cleared for distribution.
